title: cajanus albicans
intro: Cajanus albicans, also known as the "yellow gram" or "cluster bean", is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is native to parts of Asia and Australia, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against infections. Cajanus albicans can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
